title: Neurosymbolic AI -- Why, What, and How
description:
These systems have the ability to blend the
powerful approximation abilities of neural networks with the symbolic reasoning
capabilities that enable them to reason about abstract concepts, extrapolate
from limited data, and generate explainable results[7].
